site.name: The Long Ball
site.tagline: Digging the data behind the distance.

description: Stadium-neutral home-run quality leaderboard for qualified MLB hitters.
sourceNotes: Uses public Statcast pitch data from pybaseball, Baseball Savant Home Run Tracker Adjusted mode, and Baseball Savant batted-ball leaderboard fields. The frontend reads this precomputed static JSON and never queries Statcast directly.

fields.team: Most recent batting team inferred from Statcast context.
fields.bbe: Batted-ball events in the cached Statcast sample.
fields.pa: Plate appearances inferred from unique game and at-bat identifiers in the cached Statcast sample.
fields.hr: Actual home runs in the cached Statcast sample.
fields.longballIndex: LBI v1.3 plus-style score for stadium-neutral home-run contact quality. 100 is league average among qualified hitters.
fields.xhr: Adjusted expected home runs from Baseball Savant Home Run Tracker.
fields.xhrPerBbe: Adjusted expected home runs per batted-ball event.
fields.barrelRate: Share of batted balls classified as barrels.
fields.hrWindowThunderBbe: Count of batted balls hit 105 mph or harder with launch angle between 25 and 40 degrees.
fields.hrWindowThunderRate: Share of batted balls hit 105 mph or harder with launch angle between 25 and 40 degrees. LBI v1.3 component.
fields.hardHitRate: Share of batted balls hit 95 mph or harder.
fields.avgDistanceOnBarrels: Average projected distance on barreled batted balls. Reference stat only, not part of LBI v1.3.
fields.pullAirRate: Pull Air percentage from Baseball Savant's batted-ball leaderboard. Reference stat only.
fields.pullAirJuice: Pulled-air balls hit 105 mph or harder per plate appearance. Context stat only, not part of LBI.
fields.pullAirJuicePer100Pa: Pulled-air balls hit 105 mph or harder per 100 plate appearances. Context stat only, not part of LBI.
fields.pulledAirBbe: Pulled batted balls with launch angle between 15 and 45 degrees.
fields.crushedPulledAirBbe: Pulled-air batted balls hit 105 mph or harder.
fields.sweetSpotRate: Share of batted balls launched between 8 and 32 degrees. Reference stat only.
fields.actualDoubterHr: Actual home runs classified as Doubters by Home Run Tracker detail data.
fields.cheapieRate: Actual Doubter HR divided by actual HR total.
fields.dailyFeatures: Latest-date Daily Dong, Hot Dog Robbery, and Cheapest Dong event objects.

source.fetcher: canonical pitch cache + Baseball Savant Home Run Tracker
source.methodology: Adjusted xHR/BBE anchored formula: 50%, Barrel% 20%, HR-Window Thunder Rate 25%, Hard Hit% 5%
